ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company in VND */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock market ticker symbol for the company */,
  "is_listed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the company is currently listed on the stock market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue in VND */,
  "net_profit" TEXT /* Net profit in VND */,
  "total_assets" TEXT /* Total assets in VND */,
  "total_liabilities" TEXT /* Total liabilities in VND */,
  "equity" TEXT /* Shareholder equity in VND */,
  "book_value_per_share" REAL /* Book value per share */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt to equity ratio */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin */,
  "return_on_assets" REAL /* Return on assets */,
  "return_on_equity" REAL /* Return on equity */,
  "current_ratio" REAL /* Current ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
